stemHtml: What is the standard turn in a holding pattern?

options.a: 15° of bank or rate one turn, whichever requires the greater bank.
options.b: 25° of bank or rate one turn, whichever requires the lesser bank.
options.c: 25° of bank or rate one turn, whichever requires the greater bank.
options.d: 20° of bank or rate one turn, whichever requires the lesser bank.
